prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: faction art, square mobile game illustration
Primary request: Light faction key art for Vavarda
Scene/background: luminous temple heights above storm clouds, radiant sigils, marble steps, celestial sky breaks
Subject: central guardian of the Light path, battle-mage in ivory and gold armor with blue-white magic, elegant staff or halo blade, calm but powerful
Style/medium: premium fantasy faction illustration, polished, readable, made for a mobile game path selection screen
Composition/framing: centered full figure, square composition, heroic silhouette, balanced and clean
Lighting/mood: radiant, disciplined, sacred, noble, with subtle divine power rather than soft weakness
Color palette: ivory, pale gold, cold blue-white light, silver, faint violet echoes to match the world
Materials/textures: polished armor, temple stone, sacred cloth, crystal light particles
Quality: high
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no frame, one character only, keep the Light faction powerful and high-status, not generic angel art
